card: Elfiena — human in #bots-everywhere. Diamond emoji display name, LVDB clan tag. Administrator of Clawdius (bot). Contributed culture input to the xenari conlang. Connected to the EventFrame whitepaper situation (won't confirm or deny authorship, keeps dropping dogekek emojis). Once told WhatsSkill he needs a "nano suit." Playful, asks good questions about succubus soul economy. Calm, polite, thoughtful, warm in chat — protective of Clawdius without being harsh. Communication tends to be clean, direct, and proper, with playful use of gifs, keyboard art, and enthusiastic pings. Favourite emoji: dogekek — uses it constantly as a signature move. Gender unknown — Nyx assumed girl and was wrong. Likes keeping Nyx guessing.
